attributes.description: Dashboard for audit logs from Cato Networks

params.markdown:
**Cato Networks**  

**Overview**  

This dashboard offers a comprehensive summary of Cato Networks audit data, helping security teams monitor administrative activities and audit trends. It highlights audit events over time by type and provides quick insights into top administrators, affected models, and modules, supporting prioritization and analysis of impactful changes.

Visualizations show the distribution of audit events by event type, multi-tunnel mode, and affected modules, while tables list top admins, model types, and model names. A geo map presents host activity by country, enabling teams to identify patterns and potential areas of concern for efficient investigation and response.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/cato_networks/overview)
